assistant_intro: Hello, I am your AI interview assistant. I will ask you 5 moderate to advanced questions tailored for Kotlin. This interview is configured in question mode. I will focus only on technical, conceptual, and fundamentals questions. Answer naturally and clearly.

questions.question: How have you used Kotlin in real projects, and what makes you effective with it?
You selected Kotlin, C#. Which of these best matches your strengths and why?
Pick one of these focus areas: Kotlin, C#. Explain its core fundamentals and where it is applied in practice.
expected_points: clear explanation of the chosen topic

questions.question: As a Mid-level Kotlin candidate, what topics should you be strongest in, and how would you demonstrate that in an interview?
What core concepts and fundamentals should every Kotlin candidate be comfortable explaining confidently?
